name: Frigate
compose:
name: slashnode-frigate
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/blakeblackshear/frigate:0.17.1
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    privileged: true
    environment:
      FRIGATE_RTSP_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
      - web_data-config:/config
      - web_data-storage:/media/frigate
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5004:8971
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-frigate_web_data-config
  web_data-storage:
    name: slashnode-frigate_web_data-storage
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (frigate). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://frigate.video/. Default login — user: "admin", password: "". ⚠️ SECURITY: web: runs privileged.
